title: Inspect vehicle damage and determine repair procedures
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect vehicle damage and determine repair procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect vehicle damage

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret vehicle specifications and repair procedures from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Locate, check and confirm vehicle to be inspected against vehicle information in workplace instructions1.5 Analyse inspection methods, and select required option for vehicle and job requirement1.6 Source and prepare materials and equipment required to conduct inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret vehicle specifications and repair procedures from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Locate, check and confirm vehicle to be inspected against vehicle information in workplace instructions1.5 Analyse inspection methods, and select required option for vehicle and job requirement1.6 Source and prepare materials and equipment required to conduct inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret vehicle specifications and repair procedures from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Locate, check and confirm vehicle to be inspected against vehicle information in workplace instructions1.5 Analyse inspection methods, and select required option for vehicle and job requirement1.6 Source and prepare materials and equipment required to conduct inspection.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to inspect vehicle damage

elements.title: Inspect vehicle damage

pcs.text: Inspect vehicle to determine location and extent of direct and indirect damage according to OEM or authorised agency’s recommended procedures, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Take measurements and record inspection findings according to workplace procedures2.3 Complete vehicle inspection without causing damage to vehicle or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect vehicle to determine location and extent of direct and indirect damage according to OEM or authorised agency’s recommended procedures, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Take measurements and record inspection findings according to workplace procedures2.3 Complete vehicle inspection without causing damage to vehicle or components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect vehicle to determine location and extent of direct and indirect damage according to OEM or authorised agency’s recommended procedures, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Take measurements and record inspection findings according to workplace procedures2.3 Complete vehicle inspection without causing damage to vehicle or components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect vehicle damage

elements.title: Complete repair report

pcs.text: Prepare vehicle inspection report and repair plan and give to required personnel according to workplace procedures3.2 Identify direct and indirect damage to vehicle clearly in report, based on workplace and OEM or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures3.3 Check report for accuracy and completeness and finalise for submission to insurance company and/or customer according to workplace procedures3.4 Provide responses to queries about the damage inspection and repair report when requested
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare vehicle inspection report and repair plan and give to required personnel according to workplace procedures3.2 Identify direct and indirect damage to vehicle clearly in report, based on workplace and OEM or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures3.3 Check report for accuracy and completeness and finalise for submission to insurance company and/or customer according to workplace procedures3.4 Provide responses to queries about the damage inspection and repair report when requested?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare vehicle inspection report and repair plan and give to required personnel according to workplace procedures3.2 Identify direct and indirect damage to vehicle clearly in report, based on workplace and OEM or authorised agency’s recommended repair procedures3.3 Check report for accuracy and completeness and finalise for submission to insurance company and/or customer according to workplace procedures3.4 Provide responses to queries about the damage inspection and repair report when requested.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete repair report

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
